reproduction_steps: shouldReturnBodyWhenEnabledAndNoMax passes when run alone but fails when run immediately after shouldNotReturnBodyWhenEnabledButLongerThanMaxSize in the same JVM process (JDK 8, no restart between them). Same-class pair.
error_messages: expected:<... was "404" with body[: """ { "error": "not found" } """]. > but was:<... was "404" with body[ <exceeding max size to show>]. >
